answer:
Systeme.io provides an official Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that enables AI assistants like Claude and ChatGPT to interact with your account data using natural language [1][2][3].

The official server currently focuses on three core areas:
* Contact management (creating, updating, deleting, and tagging contacts, plus managing custom fields) [1].
* Newsletter management (creating and retrieving drafts) [1].
* Funnel management (creating and retrieving opt-in steps) [1].

To use it, generate an MCP key in your Systeme.io profile settings under MCP and API keys [4]. You can then connect this to your AI tool using the server URL: `https://mcp.systeme.io/mcp?mcpKey=YOURMCPKEY` [2][3]. Note that keys expire after 90 days, and you are limited to two active keys at a time [1][4]. While community-maintained or third-party servers exist, the official integration is accessed via your Systeme.io dashboard [1][5].
